dashboard.operationsFeedSubtitle: Realtime operational activity across your workspace.
dashboard.noActivityDescription: Workspace activity will appear here in realtime.
dashboard.orbitIntelligenceSubtitle: Operational awareness and recommendations across your workspace.
dashboard.workspaceMemorySubtitle: Captured knowledge, decisions and operational context across your workspace.
dashboard.noWorkspaceMemoryDescription: Knowledge and operational context will appear here as your workspace evolves.
dashboard.heroSubtitle: Workspace systems operational. AI monitoring active execution across your environment.
dashboard.allSystemsOperational: All systems operational. No critical issues detected.
dashboard.workspaceActionsSubtitle: Execute actions across your workspace environment.

crm.title: Customer Relationships
crm.subtitle: Manage leads, customers and workspace relationships in one unified system.
crm.crmReadyDescription: Start building your AI-powered customer workspace. Add contacts, manage pipelines and let Orbit AI optimize business relationships.
crm.confirmDeleteContact: This contact will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.

tasks.tasksExecutionSubtitle: Track operational work, ownership and execution across your workspace.
tasks.noTasksDescription: Create your first task and start organizing work across your workspace.
tasks.tasksSubtitle: Manage work, ownership and execution across your workspace.
tasks.comingSoonDescription: The Tasks module is currently being prepared as part of OrbitDesk Workspace OS.
tasks.createTaskSubtitle: Add a new task to your workspace.
tasks.deleteDescription: This task will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.

companies.organizationsSubtitle: Monitor business relationships, commercial opportunities and portfolio performance.
companies.contactsSubtitle: Customer stakeholders, decision makers and operational contacts.
companies.activitySubtitle: Historical relationship interactions and operational events.
companies.noOrganizationsDescription: Create your first organization to start managing business relationships.
companies.confirmDeleteOrganization: This will permanently delete this organization and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.

deals.commercialPipelineSubtitle: Monitor opportunities, revenue forecasts and sales execution.
deals.noDealsDescription: Create your first opportunity to start tracking commercial execution.
deals.invalidValue: Value must be greater than or equal to 0
deals.noActivityDescription: Activity will appear here as the opportunity evolves.

notes.title: Notes
notes.subtitle: Capture ideas, meeting summaries and workspace knowledge.
notes.noNotesDescription: Create your first note above to start capturing workspace knowledge.
notes.confirmDeleteNote: This note will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.

automations.title: AI-powered business automations.
automations.subtitle: Automate repetitive workflows, CRM actions and business operations with OrbitDesk AI.
automations.suggestion1: Create tasks from meeting notes automatically
automations.suggestion2: Generate CRM follow-up reminders using AI
automations.suggestion3: Detect inactive leads and suggest re-engagement
automations.automation1Description: Automatically create a follow-up task when a new lead is added.
automations.automation2Description: Generate AI summaries after creating company notes.
automations.automation3Description: Create onboarding tasks when a customer is moved to won stage.
automations.automation4Description: Notify team members about overdue tasks and deadlines.
automations.previewBannerDescription: Automations are not yet active. This module is coming soon.

ai.title: AI Assistant
ai.subtitle: Access AI-powered workspace tools and explore upcoming intelligent features.
ai.overviewSubtitle: Your workspace at a glance. All data is live from your current workspace.
ai.modulesSubtitle: Advanced AI capabilities are in development. Explore what is coming to OrbitDesk.
ai.chatDesc: Conversational AI with access to your workspace. Ask questions, get summaries and trigger actions.
ai.automationDesc: AI-driven automation that learns from your team patterns and optimizes recurring workflows.
ai.insightsDesc: Surface patterns, anomalies and recommendations automatically from your workspace data.
ai.knowledgeDesc: A unified knowledge layer that captures context from notes, conversations and workspace activity.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your workspace, members, preferences and security.
settings.workspaceIdentitySubtitle: Your workspace name and description across OrbitDesk.
settings.generatedAvatarSubtitle: Logo upload available in a future release.
settings.inviteByEmailSubtitle: Send an email invitation to add a new member to this workspace.
settings.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
settings.alreadyInvited: This email already has a pending invite
settings.alreadyMember: This person is already a workspace member
settings.forbidden: You do not have permission to invite members
settings.noMembersDescription: Your workspace has no members yet.
settings.removeMemberConfirm: Remove {name} from this workspace? They will lose all access immediately.
settings.preferencesSubtitle: Configure workspace currency, timezone and date format.
settings.languageComingSoon: User-level language switching is coming soon
settings.dangerZoneSubtitle: Irreversible actions that affect your entire workspace.
settings.leaveWorkspaceDescription: Remove yourself from this workspace. You will lose access immediately.
settings.leaveWorkspaceConfirm: Are you sure you want to leave this workspace? You will lose access to all workspace data.
settings.ownerCannotLeave: Workspace owner cannot leave. Delete the workspace instead.
settings.deleteWorkspaceDescription: Permanently delete this workspace and all its data. This cannot be undone.
settings.deleteWorkspaceConfirm: This will permanently delete {name} and all its data — members, deals, contacts, notes and tasks. This action cannot be undone.
settings.myWorkspacesSubtitle: All workspaces you are a member of.

activity.title: Live Activity Timeline
activity.subtitle: Monitor live AI actions, workflow executions, workspace updates and operational events across OrbitDesk.
activity.noActivityDescription: Orbit AI activity and workflow events will appear here live.

analytics.title: Workspace Analytics
analytics.subtitle: Monitor workspace activity, track progress and understand what is happening across your team.
analytics.modulesSubtitle: Advanced analytics modules are in development. Track your most important metrics below.
analytics.revenueDesc: Track deal revenue, forecast pipeline value and monitor financial performance across your workspace.
analytics.pipelineDesc: Understand deal progression, identify bottlenecks and optimize your sales pipeline performance.
analytics.teamDesc: Monitor individual and team productivity, task completion rates and collaboration metrics.
analytics.aiDesc: Orbit AI will analyze workspace patterns and surface intelligent forecasts and recommendations.

calendar.title: Workspace Calendar
calendar.subtitle: Connect your calendar to see upcoming meetings and scheduling context across your workspace.
calendar.noConnectionsDescription: Connect Google Calendar to see your upcoming meetings inside OrbitDesk.
calendar.disconnectConfirm: This will remove the connection and delete all synced events from this workspace.
calendar.noEventsDescription: Connect a calendar and sync to see your upcoming meetings here.

email.title: Workspace Email
email.subtitle: Connect your Gmail account to track communication history and link emails to CRM contacts.
email.noConnectionsDescription: Connect your Gmail account to see communication threads inside OrbitDesk.
email.disconnectConfirm: This will remove the connection and delete all synced email threads from this workspace.
email.noThreadsDescription: Connect a Gmail account and sync to see email threads here.

workspace.newWorkspaceSubtitle: Start fresh with a new workspace for a different team or project.
